skills.name: self-improving-agent
skills.description: Built-in self-improvement loop for Omnibot agents. Use to record non-trivial failures, user corrections, outdated assumptions, and reusable best practices into structured workspace learnings, then promote stable rules into memory.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Guide for creating and updating effective Omnibot skills. Use when the user wants to add a new skill or improve an existing skill for the built-in Alpine workspace, tool workflows, or reusable domain knowledge.

skills.name: oob-prompt-runtime
skills.description: Design, implement, or review OOB Prompt Runtime. Use for "系统提示词", "提示词运行时", "提示词组装", "prompt dump", "项目上下文注入", "上下文预算", "初始输入契约", static core, dynamic environment, device state, current app, memory, locale, tool instructions, task prompts, or prompt debugging.

skills.name: oob-native-workbench
skills.description: Build OOB-native Workbench projects that bind Skill-driven workflows, Project Tools, Workspace files, and Flutter frontend displays.

skills.name: oob-project-designer
skills.description: Design and create an OOB Workbench Project from a user's natural-language description of a personal tool, tracker, or recurring workflow. Use when the user says "帮我做一个", "我想创建一个", "build me a", "make a [X] tracker/tool/app", or expresses intent to build a new persistent personal tool from scratch. Also use for: designing API sets, choosing executors, reviewing frontend-backend contracts.

skills.name: oob-web-research
skills.description: 调研、搜索整理、收集资料、分析竞品、研究市场、小红书调研、GitHub分析、爬取内容、批量收集、信息汇总、网页提取。Use when gathering, extracting, or aggregating information from the web — search results, platform pages, repositories, or social content.

skills.name: oob-native-html-frontend
skills.description: 改HTML前端、改界面样式、改布局、加图表、前端热更新、修前端、写index.html、修改Project显示、改前端代码、优化移动端界面。Write, hot-update, or repair the HTML/CSS/vanilla JS display layer of an OOB Workbench Project. Use when the task is about frontend files — not Project design or API definition.

skills.name: oob-project-distiller
skills.description: Distill an external product, GitHub repository, vibe-app share, technical document, article, pasted notes, screenshots, or product demo into an OOB Workbench Project proposal or implementation. Use when the user asks to analyze a project/link/doc and "总结成我们的 project", "蒸馏能力", "提取核心设计", "生成 soul", "把这个 app/项目变成 OOB Project", or preserve UI design, interaction logic, data model, backend AI workflows, and product intent without cloning proprietary assets.

skills.name: oob-project-updater
skills.description: 改、加、删、修、更新、修复、优化已有 OOB Project。加字段、改界面、新增 API、修复 bug、更新规则。Use when modifying an existing project, not creating from scratch.

skills.name: oob-project-reviewer
skills.description: Review and fix OOB Workbench Project HTML before creation or hot-update. Use after generating or modifying HTML, before workbench_project_create or workbench_project_update. Checks frontend-backend contract, mobile standards, data binding, and API alignment.

skills.name: find-install-skills
skills.description: Find and install relevant Omnibot skills. Use when the user asks "找个 skill", "有没有这个功能的 skill", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill for X","install a skill for X", or wants to extend the agent with an installable workflow.
